app.alreadyRunningText:
Guerrilla appears to already be open in another window. Two windows share the same config/state files (last save wins).

Open a new window anyway?
  Yes = open it now    No = switch to the existing window (Alt+Tab)

run.heroSubtitle: One click per platform. Every check is read-only, every verdict carries evidence, and the HTML report opens when the run completes.
run.adDescription: Domain and forest posture, Kerberos, delegation, Tier Zero, GPOs and more. Runs as your current domain user; no stored credential needed.
run.cloudDescription: Conditional Access, authentication methods, PIM, applications, Exchange and tenant posture. Uses the app credential stored in your Safehouse.
run.gwsDescription: Authentication, Drive, OAuth, admin management and K12 student posture. Uses the service account stored in your Safehouse.
run.campaignDescription: Every platform in sequence, one combined report, and a delta against your previous run.

options.title: Options
options.testModeTip: Simulate a scan with no live connection. Produces an all-fail report so you can preview themes and branding.
options.categoriesHint: Applied to whichever platform you run. Campaign always runs each platform's default set.
options.studentOusHelp: Comma-separated OU paths that contain student accounts, e.g. /Students. K12 checks that assess student posture require this; without it they report Not Assessed.
options.studentOusTip: Comma-separated OU path(s) containing student accounts, e.g. /Students or OU=Students,DC=district,DC=org. Required by the OU-scoped K12 checks; leave empty to skip them (they report Not Assessed).

status.running: Running {0} (mode: {1}) · the report opens when the run completes
status.completeNoReport: Scan complete (no report path returned; check the output directory).

dialog.selectOutputDir: Select output directory for the scan report

safehouse.title: Safehouse
safehouse.subtitle: Stored credentials, expiration status, and rotation history.
safehouse.vaultUnavailableText:
Could not read vault: {0}

The vault may not be initialized yet. Click 'Add credential' to set it up.
safehouse.savedText: Stored {0} credential value(s). Use 'Test all' to verify connectivity.
safehouse.selectRowRemove: Select a credential row first, then click Remove selected.
safehouse.selectRowRotate: Select a credential row first, then click Rotate selected.
safehouse.rotateHint:
To rotate, run from a PowerShell prompt:

    Set-Safehouse -Rotate {0}
safehouse.noCredentials: No credentials were found to test. Add credentials first.

reports.title: Reports
reports.pdfDone: PDF generated next to the HTML report.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Runtime configuration applied to all subsequent scans.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.subtitle: Read the actual source of every scan, check, and helper in this module. Filter by area or search by name, then select a function to view its code.
inspector.selectPrompt: Select a function to view its source.

branding.title: Report branding
branding.subtitle: White-label the header of generated reports with your firm's details. The "Generated with Guerrilla by Jim Tyler, Microsoft MVP" attribution always remains in the footer. Saved to your config and applied on the next scan.
branding.savedAt: Saved at {0}. Applied on your next scan.

credential.heading: Add a credential to the Safehouse
credential.delegationNote: The service account needs domain-wide delegation configured in the Google Admin Console.
credential.errTenantGuid: Tenant ID must be a GUID.
credential.errClientGuid: Client ID must be a GUID.
credential.errExpiryFormat: Secret expiry must be YYYY-MM-DD (or left blank).
credential.errSaJsonInvalid: Service account JSON is not valid (no client_email).
credential.errAdminEmail: A valid admin email is required.
